mapper.select: select file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, upload_date, file_version, file_use_yn from attach_file where file_id = #{fileId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ATTACH_FILE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL( MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(file_id, -4))), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM attach_file WHERE file_id LIKE 'ATTACH_FILE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
insert into attach_file ( file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, file_version,
document_version_id,
connect_address ) values ( #{fileId}, #{projectId}, #{versionId}, #{fileCode}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadUserId}, #{fileVersion},
#{documentVersionId},
#{connectAddress} )

SELECT 'FILE_DOWNLOAD_HISTORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL( MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(download_history_id, -4))), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM file_download_history WHERE download_history_id LIKE 'FILE_DOWNLOAD_HISTORY_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
insert into file_download_history ( download_history_id, file_id, download_user_id ) values ( #{downloadHistoryId}, #{fileId}, #{downloadUserId} )
mapper.select: select file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, upload_date, file_version, file_use_yn, connect_address, document_version_id from attach_file where document_version_id = #{documentVersionId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ATTACH_FILE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL( MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(file_id, -4))), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM attach_file WHERE file_id LIKE 'ATTACH_FILE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_%'
insert into attach_file ( file_id, project_id, version_id, file_code, original_name, stored_name, file_path, file_size, upload_user_id, file_version, document_version_id, connect_address ) values ( #{fileId}, #{projectId}, #{versionId}, #{fileCode}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadUserId}, #{fileVersion}, #{documentVersionId}, #{connectAddress} )
mapper.select: SELECT h.download_history_id, h.file_id, f.original_name, h.download_user_id, u.user_name, h.download_date, f.connect_address, f.document_version_id FROM file_download_history h LEFT JOIN users u ON h.download_user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN attach_file f ON h.file_id = f.file_id LEFT JOIN users u ON h.download_user_id = u.user_id WHERE f.connect_address = #{connectAddress} AND f.document_version_id = #{documentVersionId}
